TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Arron Afflalo Htuw beh kawas 1985 cyacing te 10 ryax te 15 beh kya Los Angeles, California, USA, sinsyuw unroing sinmung pzyuy' mari' ykura' kari' American professional basketball. kinwagiw sin'rux niya' ga 196 kungxun, kin'usuw niya' lga 95 kungcin. kki'an niya' iy mspung mari' lga, pklahang te suruw, squw pkaki' te syaw hazi' na kska'. nanu' squw pyayaw giqas na sinsyuw na NBA squw kawas na 2007 qasa ga, nisan thwiru' nxal na' ga, maki' 27 binkgan lalu' niya' ruw alun kya na Detroit Pistons la, ga kni'an niya' mtama' thekan hya' ga yaquw kawas 2007 byacing te 11 ryax te 1. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' Detroit Pistons (2007–2009) maki' squw kawas te 2009 byacing te 2 ryax te 14 ga, trang squw mspung kya squw pins'rux na Arizona Phoenix msspung na pzyang baq tkra' na NBA ga, wan sraw ni Afflalo minpusal maqux quw Pistons. Denver Nuggets (2009–2012) squw kawas te 2009 byacing te 6 ryax sa 13ga, wan nha' tbirun beh Denver gold team quw Afflalo qasa. Orlando Magic (2012–2014) squw kawas te 2012 byacing te 8 ryax sa 10 ga, wan nha' tbirun beh Orlando Magic quw Afflalo qasa. squw kawas te 2013 byacing te 12 ryax sa 3 ga, txal nanak pspung quw Afflalo ga 43 bang quw tinsu' niya, trang kya ga wal niya' sbiru' kya quw kirok niya' sa ryax niya' mzyuy' mari' qasa. Denver Nuggets (2014–2015) squw kawas te 2014 byacing te 6 ryax sa 26 ga, wan nha' tbirun beh Back to the Denver gold team quw Afflalo qasa, ruw mnwah mspung squw t'aring balay ppspngan nha' squw byacing te 10 ryax te 29, ruw txal nanak qasa lga wal niya' siy aliy 15 ting tinsu' kya, ruw min 4quw qnul niya' mari' zik na waya'. Portland Trail Blazers (2015) squw kawas te 2015 byacing te 2 ryax sa 19 ga, wan nha' tbirun beh Portland Pioneers quw Afflalo qasa. New York Knicks (2015–2016) squw kawas te 2015 byacing te 6 ryax sa 9 ga, wan miru' ketak kya squw New York Nick team. Wan niya shoqan quw minmspat pinspung naha' squw pinspngan nha' sa t'ringan na pinspngan, ruw tehuk beh byacing 11 ryax 11 lga musa' mspung squw mtama' sa thekan na Charlotte Hornets. Sacramento Kings (2016–2017) squw kawas te 2016 byacing te 7 ryax sa 9 ga, wan miru' kayak squw Sacramento Kings, ga maki' squw kawas te 2017 byacing te 6 ryax 23 lga,wan nha' laxan kya la. Orlando Magic (2017–2018) squw kawas te 2017 byacing te 6 ryax sa 27 ga, miru' kayak squw Orlando Magic, t'aring kya squw te sazing pspngan na The magic team la. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: arron a**lalo ħtuw βeħ kawas~ɕ **** ʦ~ʨjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** rjax te ** βeħ kja los~ɕ aŋeles~ɕ, ʦ~ʨali*ornia, us~ɕa, s~ɕins~ɕjuw unroiŋ s~ɕinmuŋ pzjujʔ mariʔ jkuraʔ kariʔ ameriʦ~ʨan pro*es~ɕs~ɕional βas~ɕketβall. kinwaɣiw s~ɕinʔrux nijaʔ ɣa *** kuŋxun, kinʔus~ɕuw nijaʔ lɣa ** kuŋʦ~ʨin. kkiʔan nijaʔ ij ms~ɕpuŋ mariʔ lɣa, pklaħaŋ te s~ɕuruw, s~ɕquw pkakiʔ te s~ɕjaw ħaziʔ na ks~ɕkaʔ. nanuʔ s~ɕquw pjajaw ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕins~ɕjuw na nβa s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ na **** qas~ɕa ɣa, nis~ɕan tħwiruʔ nxal naʔ ɣa, makiʔ ** βinkɣan laluʔ nijaʔ ruw alun kja na *etroit pis~ɕtons~ɕ la, ɣa kniʔan nijaʔ mtamaʔ tħekan ħjaʔ ɣa jaquw kawas~ɕ **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** rjax te *. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ *etroit pis~ɕtons~ɕ (*********) makiʔ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * rjax te ** ɣa, traŋ s~ɕquw ms~ɕpuŋ kja s~ɕquw pins~ɕʔrux na arizona pħoenix ms~ɕs~ɕpuŋ na pzjaŋ βaq tkraʔ na nβa ɣa, wan s~ɕraw ni a**lalo minpus~ɕal maqux quw pis~ɕtons~ɕ. *en*er nuɣɣets~ɕ (*********) s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * rjax s~ɕa **ɣa, wan nħaʔ tβirun βeħ *en*er ɣol* team quw a**lalo qas~ɕa. orlan*o maɣiʦ~ʨ (*********) s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * rjax s~ɕa ** ɣa, wan nħaʔ tβirun βeħ orlan*o maɣiʦ~ʨ quw a**lalo qas~ɕa. s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** rjax s~ɕa * ɣa, txal nanak ps~ɕpuŋ quw a**lalo ɣa ** βaŋ quw tins~ɕuʔ nija, traŋ kja ɣa wal nijaʔ s~ɕβiruʔ kja quw kirok nijaʔ s~ɕa rjax nijaʔ mzjujʔ mariʔ qas~ɕa. *en*er nuɣɣets~ɕ (*********) s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * rjax s~ɕa ** ɣa, wan nħaʔ tβirun βeħ βaʦ~ʨk to tħe *en*er ɣol* team quw a**lalo qas~ɕa, ruw mnwaħ ms~ɕpuŋ s~ɕquw tʔariŋ βalaj pps~ɕpŋan nħaʔ s~ɕquw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** rjax te **, ruw txal nanak qas~ɕa lɣa wal nijaʔ s~ɕij alij ** tiŋ tins~ɕuʔ kja, ruw min *quw qnul nijaʔ mariʔ zik na wajaʔ. portlan* trail βlazers~ɕ (****) s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * rjax s~ɕa ** ɣa, wan nħaʔ tβirun βeħ portlan* pioneers~ɕ quw a**lalo qas~ɕa. new jork kniʦ~ʨks~ɕ (*********) s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * rjax s~ɕa * ɣa, wan miruʔ ketak kja s~ɕquw new jork niʦ~ʨk team. wan nija s~ɕħoqan quw minms~ɕpat pins~ɕpuŋ naħaʔ s~ɕquw pins~ɕpŋan nħaʔ s~ɕa tʔriŋan na pins~ɕpŋan, ruw teħuk βeħ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax ** lɣa mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ s~ɕquw mtamaʔ s~ɕa tħekan na ʦ~ʨħarlotte ħornets~ɕ. s~ɕaʦ~ʨramento kiŋs~ɕ (*********) s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * rjax s~ɕa * ɣa, wan miruʔ kajak s~ɕquw s~ɕaʦ~ʨramento kiŋs~ɕ, ɣa makiʔ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * rjax ** lɣa,wan nħaʔ laxan kja la. orlan*o maɣiʦ~ʨ (*********) s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * rjax s~ɕa ** ɣa, miruʔ kajak s~ɕquw orlan*o maɣiʦ~ʨ, tʔariŋ kja s~ɕquw te s~ɕaziŋ ps~ɕpŋan na tħe maɣiʦ~ʨ team la. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Arron Afflalo Htuw beh kawas 1985 cyacing te 10 ryax te 15 beh kya Los Angeles, California, USA, sinsyuw unroing sinmung pzyuy' mari' ykura' kari' American professional basketball. kinwagiw sin'rux niya' ga 196 kungxun, kin'usuw niya' lga 95 kungcin. kki'an niya' iy mspung mari' lga, pklahang te suruw, squw pkaki' te syaw hazi' na kska'. nanu' squw pyayaw giqas na sinsyuw na NBA squw kawas na 2007 qasa ga, nisan thwiru' nxal na' ga, maki' 27 binkgan lalu' niya' ruw alun kya na Detroit Pistons la, ga kni'an niya' mtama' thekan hya' ga yaquw kawas 2007 byacing te 11 ryax te 1. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' Detroit Pistons (2007–2009) maki' squw kawas te 2009 byacing te 2 ryax te 14 ga, trang squw mspung kya squw pins'rux na Arizona Phoenix msspung na pzyang baq tkra' na NBA ga, wan sraw ni Afflalo minpusal maqux quw Pistons. Denver Nuggets (2009–2012) squw kawas te 2009 byacing te 6 ryax sa 13ga, wan nha' tbirun beh Denver gold team quw Afflalo qasa. Orlando Magic (2012–2014) squw kawas te 2012 byacing te 8 ryax sa 10 ga, wan nha' tbirun beh Orlando Magic quw Afflalo qasa. squw kawas te 2013 byacing te 12 ryax sa 3 ga, txal nanak pspung quw Afflalo ga 43 bang quw tinsu' niya, trang kya ga wal niya' sbiru' kya quw kirok niya' sa ryax niya' mzyuy' mari' qasa. Denver Nuggets (2014–2015) squw kawas te 2014 byacing te 6 ryax sa 26 ga, wan nha' tbirun beh Back to the Denver gold team quw Afflalo qasa, ruw mnwah mspung squw t'aring balay ppspngan nha' squw byacing te 10 ryax te 29, ruw txal nanak qasa lga wal niya' siy aliy 15 ting tinsu' kya, ruw min 4quw qnul niya' mari' zik na waya'. Portland Trail Blazers (2015) squw kawas te 2015 byacing te 2 ryax sa 19 ga, wan nha' tbirun beh Portland Pioneers quw Afflalo qasa. New York Knicks (2015–2016) squw kawas te 2015 byacing te 6 ryax sa 9 ga, wan miru' ketak kya squw New York Nick team. Wan niya shoqan quw minmspat pinspung naha' squw pinspngan nha' sa t'ringan na pinspngan, ruw tehuk beh byacing 11 ryax 11 lga musa' mspung squw mtama' sa thekan na Charlotte Hornets. Sacramento Kings (2016–2017) squw kawas te 2016 byacing te 7 ryax sa 9 ga, wan miru' kayak squw Sacramento Kings, ga maki' squw kawas te 2017 byacing te 6 ryax 23 lga,wan nha' laxan kya la. Orlando Magic (2017–2018) squw kawas te 2017 byacing te 6 ryax sa 27 ga, miru' kayak squw Orlando Magic, t'aring kya squw te sazing pspngan na The magic team la. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

rjax nijaʔ mzjujʔ mariʔ qas~ɕa. *en*er nuɣɣets~ɕ (*********) s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * rjax s~ɕa ** ɣa, wan nħaʔ tβirun βeħ βaʦ~ʨk to tħe *en*er ɣol* team quw a**lalo qas~ɕa, ruw mnwaħ ms~ɕpuŋ s~ɕquw tʔariŋ βalaj pps~ɕpŋan nħaʔ s~ɕquw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** rjax te **, ruw txal nanak qas~ɕa lɣa wal nijaʔ s~ɕij alij ** tiŋ tins~ɕuʔ kja, ruw min *quw qnul nijaʔ mariʔ zik na wajaʔ. portlan* te * rjax s~ɕa * ɣa, wan miruʔ ketak kja s~ɕquw new jork niʦ~ʨk team. wan nija s~ɕħoqan quw minms~ɕpat pins~ɕpuŋ naħaʔ s~ɕquw pins~ɕpŋan nħaʔ s~ɕa tʔriŋan na pins~ɕpŋan, ruw teħuk βeħ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax maɣiʦ~ʨ, tʔariŋ kja s~ɕquw te s~ɕaziŋ ps~ɕpŋan na tħe maɣiʦ~ʨ team la. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa
